title: Joule Thief Circuit
description: Designed and built a step-up voltage converter circuit (Joule Thief) capable of powering a standard 220V AC lamp using only a low-voltage 1.5V to 3V DC battery. This project demonstrates practical electronics engineering skills in voltage conversion, circuit design, and maximizing energy efficiency from small power sources.

title: Gas Detector System
description: Designed and built a functional gas detection system using an Arduino Nano, an MQ-135 gas sensor, a 16x2 LCD display, and LED indicators for real-time air quality monitoring. Developed to fulfill the final project requirements for the Microcontroller 1 course, this project served as a major milestone where I practically applied and learned Arduino programming (C/C++) and Assembly language for the very first time.
